positive: A minimalist, geometric depiction of a cosmic forest meeting a stylized ocean wave. The style should be a blend of Art Deco geometry and psychedelic psychedelic bio-luminescence, rendered with clean, thick black lines on a cream or dusty beige background. Focus on strong silhouette contrast and repeating radial patterns. The central composition features stylized, glowing flora (bioluminescent jungle vines, coral formations) intersecting with abstract, wave-like patterns. Use a limited color palette: deep sapphire blues, electric teal, lime green, and contrasting gold accents. The overall aesthetic must be high-contrast, suitable for direct apparel transfer, with crisp edges and no gradients, emphasizing flat design and clean graphic elements.
